ddls:
CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was made */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the announcement has received */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who made the announcement */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department targeted by the announcement */,
  "announcement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement type (e.g., holiday, event, news) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the announcement (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_announcement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_type_id") REFERENCES announcement_types ("announcement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcement_types" (
  "announcement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement type */,
  "announcement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the announcement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the announcement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the admin belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "view_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view log */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the announcement */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was viewed */,
  "engagement_time" INTEGER /* Time spent by the user engaging with the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_view_logs_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_view_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday date */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement the date belongs to */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holiday_dates_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcement_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was made */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the announcement has received */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who made the announcement */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department targeted by the announcement */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_history_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_history_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_history_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
